verdict.answer_first: B: sentence 1 says "default to REST"; A also says "start with REST" but adds more hedging immediately.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleaner: "start with REST"; A dilutes with a decision table and multiple follow-up questions.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on: "start with REST" and add GraphQL/BFF only after round-trip or over-fetching pain appears.
